title: [trustless://eil] Ofir Eliasi - Abstract the Hard Parts: A practical demo of Stitch
description:
Ofir Eliasi takes the stage to demonstrate Stitch, a dapp aggregator built on EIL using the new EIL SDK, showcasing how DeFi UX can be made simple without compromising on trustlessness

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
